item.title: Grau 51 is gone. Ukraine did it again. One of the largest ammo depots in russia exploded completely. 5kms radius evacuated because of falling debris.
item.description:
It explodes since yesterday and refuses to stop doing so.
This it was before Ukraine hit it.
Another impression.
It's noth east of Moskow, so Ukraine just shot over the town ... nice "Hey guys, nite to see you, will reach out to you later.
That's what it did the whole night.
And there are many more clips on the net about it. Oh and, it's still exploding. Slava Ukraini!

item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: A Positive Trans Story
item.description: I feel like we hear about so many horrific experiences when people come out, I thought it would be nice to share a positive one. My wife of almost eleven years has known I was a crossdresser from the start of our relationship. I've been burned before after I already got connected and wanted that out on the table in case our relationship went anywhere. A few years ago, I drunkenly came to the realization that I was trans and not a crossdresser. She has been nothing but supportive of me the entire time I've been with her. And that realization didn't change anything. I work in an extremely conservative field and to double down, a conservative small town. It's not unusual to see tRump flags flying, even now. I slowly came out to coworkers. I started with ones I suspected would be okay with it and moved to ones I was unsure about. I received a ton of support, especially from the women I work with. The most negative encounter I had was with someone who is outspokenly conservative. He told me he doesn't "agree with a lot of the trans stuff" but recognized that it doesn't impact him at all and still wanted to be friends. He also understood that my personality and traits that make me, me wasn't changing. I recognize the "youre not like those other trans people" thought isn't the best, but it wasn't outright hatred either. And hopefully I can start to change his mind about everyone as a whole. Last week I came out to my two supervisors. They kept it professional and just told me to let them know what I needed when I needed it. The response was immediate and if they were thinking other things, they didn't let it show on their face or speech. It hasn't been awkward since and it's business as usual. Best case scenario. Today I took the hardest step (in my mind) and told my parents. I called my aunt yesterday and told her first, just get her gauge on how this would go. She was supportive but was unsure about my dad. She didn't think he would be outright hostile, but warned me he may not be immediately accepting either. I called and we chatted about normal things, then I dropped the bomb. There was a little shock, but they immediately said they still loved me and cared about me. I was balling my eyes out from the relief and the stress lifting. Thankfully my wife was there to continue the conversation. I got a text from my dad a little after the phone call ended saying, "I understand how difficult it must have been to tell us about your transition. Just know we support and love you." Hit me right in the feels and I cried again. I recognize I am extremely lucky to have the support that I do. I fully understand not every has it or is even in a spot where its safe to do so. I just wanted to put some positive energy out there for people on the fence about coming out. Good stories happen just as often as the bad ones.
item.dc:creator: ClassyPirating

item.title: Awwww
item.dc:creator: MedicalScience

item.title: What Happened Today #82
item.description: The guardrails protecting our society keep disappearing. Imagine any other U.S. president insisting on the right to deport people without trials. Or imagine a government building registries of people with autism. What could those possibly be used for? The outrages come daily. So do the lies. And we can’t stop calling them out. Remember: “First they came for the socialists?” We’re several lines down now — and they’re still coming. Even if you support the economic agenda, you have to speak up for the people being targeted. Because if you don’t stop this now, your turn will come. And no one will be left to help you. Don’t trust the algorithm. Get this in your inbox every night, free and private, so you never miss what’s really going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/state-reorg 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-no-trial 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fire-powell 4. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/epa-to-fire-or-reassign-more-than-450-staffers-working-on-environmental-justice-dei/ar-AA1DoIb0 5. https://go.govbrief.today/measles-kansas 6. https://go.govbrief.today/autism-registry 7. https://go.govbrief.today/deportation-colorado 8. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-classified-info 9. https://go.govbrief.today/bessent-unsustainable 10. https://go.govbrief.today/voa-reopened 11. https://go.govbrief.today/doj-advocacy 12. https://go.govbrief.today/nsf-grants 13. https://go.govbrief.today/xinis-willful 14. https://go.govbrief.today/more-prosecutors-resign 15. https://go.govbrief.today/synthetic-dyes 16. https://go.govbrief.today/us-crimea 17. https://go.govbrief.today/borrenpohl-sues 18. https://go.govbrief.today/owens-quits-60minutes 19. https://www.newsweek.com/byron-donalds-florida-town-hall-booed-2062372

item.title: My Tifa Cosplay— Character VS Cosplay
item.description: SnarkyJayCosplay here— sharing my latest cosplay, Tifa from FF7! Specifically remake/rebirth I guess. I’ve really fallen in love with her as a character and spent a while putting this together. It’s not perfect but I’m pretty happy with it, and it’s nice to cosplay a character I both admire and identify with.

item.title: Frank
item.description:
I’m laying here in bed and I’m going through this dump and this meme popped up. It just resonated with me.
I had to go back into the kitten room to get a video of Frank. Because unfortunately the meme is correct. Ok FINE. His name is Frank. But for the purposes of my kitten naming convention his name is Cypress. Just give this one to me, please. (Edit: having read a bunch of comments, I gotta say two things: I know orange cats aren’t stupid, my most favorite boy ever, Thomas, was orange and he was super smart. Also, I think the Frank/Cypress thing is funny, it’s not annoying me!)
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

1. How to do a backflip
2. Not my problem - cat
3. Okay, this can end wholesome or spicy...
4. Bruh, what is wrong wit cats
5. Did he DRANK it all? WTF?
6
7. Came for the butt cheeks, stayed for the...
8. The lost art of water sliding
9
10. What he sees
11
12
13. Bro is out there hussling
14
15. (Sound:ON) As a game dev THIS! SO MUCH THIS! This right here is why we do it! For context: a streamer with 8 viewers was randomly playing my game last night and I decided to say Hi, he was so excited, because he loved the game :) If you wanna support us, it's on Steam with 10% discount: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1339 (gneiss)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
All my dreams last night save for one were wish fulfillment about going back to work at my old job. In the other dream, I got lost in the woods and broke a leg, but was rescued by a friend.
Prototaxites is a mystery.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "beep" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: There is an Ice War being fought on Europa, one of the moons of Jupiter
item.description:
I just learned of a collaborative fiction project that has been playing out over on twitter. It was begun earlier this year by user 'lolt64', with tons of collaborators taking up his frigid call-to-arms. Thought I would share a dump of some of my favorite contributions that I've come across to the late-night imgur crew, for any who were still unawares...
HOW LONG: FOREVER
Boris Tsui
OP's recent commentary providing some clarification on it all
Jove’s pitiless face...
...and unblinking eye
item.dc:creator: samuelwestphalia

item.title: Global dump of allsorts, most funny but not only, some are just awesome.
item.description:
That's how you play golf !
2 :: Only in Russia
3 :: He scores at destroying everything
4 :: He who has never hidden from Jehovah's Witnesses, let him cast the first stone.
5 :: Happy Bday...
6 :: Don't.
7 :: POV on the road to the Cappadocia Hot Air Balloon Festival in Turkey.
8 :: We lost visibility ...
9 :: In London, again ....
10 :: That last few meters of chain is an absolute death!. It's very dangerous, stay far away.
11 :: I'm at six a day. Thank you.
12 :: For sure, a position I would be interested in.
13 :: Okay .... Seems attractive to me.
14 :: A masterpiece
15 :: Some of the job qualifications for a TWA flight attendant in the 1940s. What a golden age for traveling !
16 :: This guy's having a bad day. Yep that's shit.
17 :: Hand writing signs with immaculate penmanship. Another good professional.
18 :: Too Late.
20 :: Feed pellet machine. I know, there is no nineteen.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot
